## Why It Is Useful

This external resource points to a citation-following workflow for finding and
filtering papers that cite a target arXiv paper.

## Use In This Repository

No text, prompts, examples, code, or files from the external repository are
copied or adapted here. This page is only a pointer to an external resource.
